query:
SELECT
            id,
            query_text,
            prototype,
            entry_type,
            analysis,
            tags,
            aliases,
            created_at,
            updated_at,
            alias_text
        FROM (
            SELECT
                ke.id,
                ke.query_text,
                ke.prototype,
                ke.entry_type,
                ke.analysis,
                ke.tags,
                ke.aliases,
                ke.created_at,
                ke.updated_at,
                alias_text
            FROM knowledge_entries ke
            CROSS JOIN LATERAL unnest(COALESCE(ke.aliases, ARRAY[]::TEXT[])) AS alias_text
            WHERE alias_text ILIKE $1
            ORDER BY alias_text ASC
            LIMIT $2
        ) matched_aliases
